member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.BufferStreamReader
member.summary: A implementation that reads character input directly from an . Used by to redirect .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.BufferStreamReader.#ctor(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Initializes a new reader for the specified .

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.BufferStreamWriter
member.summary: A implementation that writes text into a . Used by to redirect into a terminal session buffer.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.BufferStreamWriter.#ctor(VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer,VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalDecoder)
member.summary: A implementation that writes text into a . Used by to redirect into a terminal session buffer.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.BufferStreamWriter.#ctor(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Initializes a new writer for the specified .

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes
member.summary: DEC/ANSI mode flags tracked by the terminal state (DECSET/DECRST).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.ApplicationCursorKeys
member.summary: DEC private ?1 — application cursor keys (arrows send SS3).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.InsertMode
member.summary: ANSI 4 (IRM) — insert mode: printing shifts cells right instead of overwriting.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.OriginMode
member.summary: DEC private ?6 (DECOM) — origin mode: cursor positioning is relative to the scroll region.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.AutoWrap
member.summary: DEC private ?7 (DECAWM) — autowrap on reaching the right margin (default on).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.CursorBlink
member.summary: DEC private ?12 — cursor blink.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.CursorVisible
member.summary: DEC private ?25 (DECTCEM) — cursor visible (default on).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.ReverseVideo
member.summary: DEC private ?5 (DECSCNM) — reverse video (screen-wide inverse).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.ApplicationKeypad
member.summary: DEC private ?66 — application keypad (DECKPAM).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.BackspaceSendsControlH
member.summary: DEC private ?67 — backspace sends 0x08 instead of 0x7F.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.LineFeedNewLine
member.summary: ANSI 20 (LNM) — line feed/new line mode: Enter sends CR+LF, LF does CR+LF.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.BracketedPaste
member.summary: DEC private ?2004 — bracketed paste.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.FocusReporting
member.summary: DEC private ?1004 — focus reporting.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.MouseTracking
member.summary: Mouse reporting enabled at all (any of ?9/?1000/?1002/?1003).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.SgrMouseEncoding
member.summary: DEC private ?1006 — SGR mouse encoding.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.CursorShape
member.summary: DEC private ?1049 cursor-shape (DECSCUSR) last set value, for restore.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.CursorBlinking
member.summary: Whether the cursor blinks (DECSCUSR 1/2/3) vs steady (0/4).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes.Clone
member.summary: Creates a copy of the current mode state.
member.returns: A new instance with the same flag values.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.MouseTrackingMode
member.summary: Mouse tracking mode (off / X10 click / button-event / any-event motion).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.MouseTrackingMode.Off
member.summary: No mouse reporting.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.MouseTrackingMode.X10
member.summary: Legacy X11/X10 mode: report only button presses with coordinates.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.MouseTrackingMode.ButtonEvent
member.summary: Normal tracking: report button press and release events.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.MouseTrackingMode.AnyEvent
member.summary: Any-event tracking: report press, release, and motion events.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CursorShape
member.summary: Cursor shape (DECSCUSR).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CursorShape.Block
member.summary: Solid block cursor.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CursorShape.Underline
member.summary: Horizontal underline cursor.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CursorShape.Bar
member.summary: Vertical bar cursor.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalRow
member.summary: A single grid line: a cell array plus wrap/dirty metadata.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalRow.Cells
member.summary: The cell array for this row.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalRow.Wrapped
member.summary: Whether this row wraps onto the next line.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalRow.Dirty
member.summary: Whether this row has changed and needs to be redrawn.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalRow.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new row with the specified number of blank columns.
member.param: The number of columns in the row.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalRow.Length
member.summary: Gets the number of cells in this row.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalRow.Clear
member.summary: Blanks every cell and clears the wrap flag.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalRow.ClearRange(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Blanks cells starting at .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalRow.AsSpan
member.summary: Returns the row cells as a span.
member.returns: A span over the row's cell array.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalRow.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a reference to the cell at the specified column.
member.returns: A reference to the cell at column .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalRow.Resize(System.Int32)
member.summary: Grows or shrinks the cell array, preserving the surviving cells.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer
member.summary: The terminal screen model: an active grid (primary or alternate), a scrollback ring fed only by the primary screen, a scroll region, tab stops, and per-row dirty tracking. Mutation is expected to happen on a single (UI) thread; the renderer reads dirty rows.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.SyncRoot
member.summary: Lock object used to serialize buffer mutations and render reads.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.Columns
member.summary: Gets the number of columns in the active screen.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.Rows
member.summary: Gets the number of rows in the active screen.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ScrollTop
member.summary: Gets the top row of the current scroll region (inclusive).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ScrollBottom
member.summary: Gets the bottom row of the current scroll region (inclusive).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.IsAlternate
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the alternate screen is active.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ScrollbackCount
member.summary: Gets the number of rows currently stored in scrollback.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ScrollbackMax
member.summary: Gets the maximum number of rows to retain in scrollback.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.GridSize
member.summary: Convenience size (columns, rows) for consumers expecting the legacy shape.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new screen buffer.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.SetScrollbackMax(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the maximum scrollback size and trims excess rows.
member.param: The new maximum number of scrollback rows.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.GetRow(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the cells of row as a span.
member.returns: A span over the row's cells.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.GetRowObject(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the object at row .
member.returns: The row object.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.GetCell(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a reference to the cell at (, ).
member.returns: A reference to the requested cell.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.HasDirtyRows
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether any row on the active screen is dirty.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.IsRowDirty(System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines whether row is dirty.
member.returns: if the row is dirty; otherwise, .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.MarkRowDirty(System.Int32)
member.summary: Marks row dirty if it is within bounds.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.MarkRowsDirty(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Marks a range of rows dirty.
member.param: The number of rows to mark.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.MarkRowClean(System.Int32)
member.summary: Marks row clean if it is within bounds.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.MarkAllDirty
member.summary: Marks every row on the active screen dirty.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ClearAll
member.summary: Clears every cell on the active screen and marks all rows dirty.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ClearRows(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Clears rows in [, +count).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ClearCells(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Blanks cells in row from column .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.IsTabStop(System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines whether a tab stop is set at column .
member.returns: if a tab stop exists at the column; otherwise, .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.SetTabStop(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets a tab stop at column .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ClearTabStop(System.Int32)
member.summary: Clears the tab stop at column .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ClearAllTabStops
member.summary: Clears all tab stops.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.NextTabStop(System.Int32)
member.summary: Next tab stop at or after (clamped to last column).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.PrevTabStop(System.Int32)
member.summary: Previous tab stop before (clamped to 0).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.SetScrollRegion(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the scroll region to the specified inclusive row range.
member.param: The top row of the region.
The bottom row of the region.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ResetScrollRegion
member.summary: Resets the scroll region to cover the entire screen.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ScrollUp(System.Int32)
member.summary: Scrolls the current scroll region up by (content moves up).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ScrollUp(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Scrolls rows in [, ] up by lines.
member.param: The top row of the region.
The bottom row of the region.
The number of lines to scroll.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ScrollDown(System.Int32)
member.summary: Scrolls the current scroll region down by (content moves down).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ScrollDown(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Scrolls rows in [, ] down by lines.
member.param: The top row of the region.
The bottom row of the region.
The number of lines to scroll.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.InsertLines(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Inserts blank lines at row , scrolling within [, ].

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.DeleteLines(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes lines at row , scrolling within [, ].

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.InsertChars(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Inserts blank cells at (, ), shifting existing cells right.
member.param: The number of blank cells to insert.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.DeleteChars(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes cells at (, ), shifting remaining cells left and blanking the right edge.
member.param: The number of cells to delete.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.EraseChars(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Erases characters starting at (, ) without moving the cursor.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.EnterAlternateScreen
member.summary: Switches to the alternate screen, clearing it and resetting the scroll region.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.LeaveAlternateScreen
member.summary: Returns to the primary screen and marks all rows dirty.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.ClearAlternateScreen
member.summary: Clears every cell on the alternate screen if it is active.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.Resize(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Resizes the active grid to the specified dimensions, pushing dropped rows to scrollback.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.Resize(System.Int32,System.Int32,VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState)
member.summary: Resizes the active grid and adjusts the cursor state.
member.param: The cursor state to update, or .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.Resize(System.Int32,System.Int32,VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resizes the active grid and optionally adjusts the cursor state and scrollback.
member.param: The cursor state to update, or .
Whether rows dropped from the top should be pushed into scrollback.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.GetScrollback
member.summary: Snapshot of the scrollback rows (oldest first). Used by the renderer for history.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer.Dispose
member.summary: Releases resources used by the screen buffer.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.ColorSource
member.summary: How a color attribute was specified, so can resolve it.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.ColorSource.Default
member.summary: The default foreground/background (resolved by the renderer from options).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.ColorSource.Indexed
member.summary: An ANSI palette index (0–255); brightened by bold-as-bright when applicable.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.ColorSource.Direct
member.summary: A direct RGB value (truecolor).

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes
member.summary: The mutable current character-attribute state driven by SGR. Kept separate from the per-cell so colors can be resolved (palette lookup, bold-as-bright, default-color sentinels) at the moment a cell is written.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.ForegroundSource
member.summary: How the foreground color was specified.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.ForegroundIndex
member.summary: The ANSI palette index for the foreground when is .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.ForegroundRgb
member.summary: The direct RGB foreground color when is .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.BackgroundSource
member.summary: How the background color was specified.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.BackgroundIndex
member.summary: The ANSI palette index for the background when is .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.BackgroundRgb
member.summary: The direct RGB background color when is .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.UnderlineSource
member.summary: How the underline color was specified.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.UnderlineIndex
member.summary: The ANSI palette index for the underline color when is .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.UnderlineRgb
member.summary: The direct RGB underline color when is .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Bold
member.summary: SGR 1: bold (bright).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Faint
member.summary: SGR 2: faint (dim).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Italic
member.summary: SGR 3: italic.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Conceal
member.summary: SGR 8: conceal (hide text).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Inverse
member.summary: SGR 7: inverse video (swap foreground and background).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Strikethrough
member.summary: SGR 9: strikethrough.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Overline
member.summary: SGR 53: overline.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Fraktur
member.summary: SGR 20: Fraktur typeface.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Framed
member.summary: SGR 51: framed.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Encircled
member.summary: SGR 52: encircled.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.DoublyUnderlined
member.summary: SGR 21: doubly underlined.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.UnderlineStyle
member.summary: The underline style.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Blink
member.summary: The blink mode.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.HyperlinkId
member.summary: Identifier of the active hyperlink, or 0 if none.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Default
member.summary: Gets the default attribute state.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.Reset
member.summary: Resets all attributes to their default values.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CharAttributes.ToCellStyle(VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalPalette,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resolves the current attributes into a for a cell.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState
member.summary: Cursor and saved-state owned by the decoder, outside the screen buffer.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.CursorX
member.summary: The zero-based cursor column.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.CursorY
member.summary: The zero-based cursor row.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.WrapPending
member.summary: Whether the cursor wrapped to the next line and the next print should start there.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.Attributes
member.summary: The current character attributes applied to newly written cells.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.Modes
member.summary: The current terminal modes.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.SavedCursorX
member.summary: The saved cursor column from .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.SavedCursorY
member.summary: The saved cursor row from .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.SavedAttributes
member.summary: The saved character attributes from .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.SavedOriginMode
member.summary: The saved origin mode from .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.SavedWrapPending
member.summary: The saved wrap-pending flag from .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.SaveCursor
member.summary: Saves the current cursor position, attributes, origin mode, and wrap state.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalState.RestoreCursor
member.summary: Restores the cursor position, attributes, origin mode, and wrap state previously saved by .

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Enums.Blink
member.summary: Blink attribute (SGR 5 slow / 6 rapid).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Enums.Blink.None
member.summary: No blinking.
Slow.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Enums.Blink.Slow
member.summary: Rapid.
Slow blink (SGR 5).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Enums.Blink.Rapid
member.summary: Rapid blink (SGR 6).

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Enums.Underline
member.summary: Underline style for a cell (SGR 4 / 4:0..4 / 21).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Enums.Underline.None
member.summary: No underline.
Single.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Enums.Underline.Single
member.summary: Double.
Single straight underline.
Dotted.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Enums.Underline.Double
member.summary: Dashed.
Double straight underline.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Enums.Underline.Curly
member.summary: Wavy / curly underline.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Enums.Underline.Dotted
member.summary: Dotted underline.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Enums.Underline.Dashed
member.summary: Dashed underline.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.EncodingHelpers
member.summary: Helpers for converting between character encodings.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.EncodingHelpers.Convert(System.Text.Encoding,System.Text.Encoding,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Converts from to .
member.returns: The re-encoded byte array.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalDecoderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for writing text and encoded bytes to an .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalDecoderExtensions.WriteFromEncoding(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalDecoder,System.Text.Encoding,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes raw bytes encoded from into the console screen buffer via WriteConsoleW.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalDecoderExtensions.Write(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalDecoder,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Writes character into the console screen buffer via WriteConsoleW in .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalDecoderExtensions.Write(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalDecoder,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes character into the console screen buffer via WriteConsoleW in .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalDecoderExtensions.Write(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalDecoder,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes raw bytes into the console screen buffer via WriteConsoleW.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalDecoderExtensions.WriteFromEncoding(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalDecoder,System.Text.Encoding,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes raw bytes into the console screen buffer via WriteConsoleW.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions
member.summary: Convenience extension methods for working with : sending text, clearing the screen, redirecting into the terminal buffer, and creating readers to read from the terminal buffer.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.Append(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession,System.String)
member.summary: Appends text to the session input, encoding it with .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.AppendLine(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Appends a newline (Enter) to the session.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.AppendLine(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession,System.String)
member.summary: Appends text followed by a newline (Enter) to the session.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.Clear(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Clears the terminal screen using an ANSI escape sequence (ESC[2J ESC[H).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.CreateBufferWriter(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Creates a that writes directly into .
member.returns: A writer that writes to the terminal buffer.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.CreateBufferReader(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Creates a that reads directly from .
member.returns: A reader that reads from the terminal buffer.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.RedirectConsole(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Redirects to the session buffer, so output becomes visible in the terminal UI.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.RedirectConsoleInput(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Redirects to read from the session buffer.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.RedirectFullConsole(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Redirects both and to the session.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.ReadString(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Reads a string from the session input.
member.returns: The read string, or empty if no data available.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.ReadLine(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Reads a line from the session input.
member.returns: The read line, or null if no complete line available.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.<G>$BAD8AF7B4AB3B102ABB1C587EA783F40.RedirectToSession(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Redirects to the session buffer, so output becomes visible in the terminal UI.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.<G>$BAD8AF7B4AB3B102ABB1C587EA783F40.RedirectInputToSession(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Redirects to read from the session buffer.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Extensions.TerminalSessionExtensions.<G>$BAD8AF7B4AB3B102ABB1C587EA783F40.RedirectConsoleToSession(VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession)
member.summary: Redirects both and to the session.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Input.KeyboardEncoder
member.summary: Encodes terminal key events into xterm byte sequences (returned as a of ASCII/Latin-1 the caller UTF-8-encodes). Handles application cursor keys, the CSI ~ function-key table, modifier encoding, and bracketed paste. Returns null for keys that should fall through to text input.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Input.KeyboardEncoder.Encode(VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey,VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalModifier,VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalModes@)
member.summary: Encodes a key event. Returns null when the key is not a special key (let text input handle it).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Input.KeyboardEncoder.WrapBracketedPaste(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: The bracketed-paste envelope (active only when ?2004 is set).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Input.KeyboardEncoder.EncodeModifiers(VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalModifier)
member.summary: xterm modifier code: 1 + shift + 2*alt + 4*ctrl (+ 8*meta).

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Input.MouseEncoder
M:VirtualTerminal.Input.MouseEncoder.EncodeButton(VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalMouseButton,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32,VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalModifier,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Encodes a button event using SGR (1006) if enabled, else the legacy form.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Input.MouseEncoder.EncodeWheel(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32,VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalModifier,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Encodes a mouse-wheel event.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey
member.summary: UI-agnostic terminal key identifiers used by .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.None
member.summary: No key.
Enter.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.Enter
member.summary: Back.
Return / Enter key.
Escape.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.Back
member.summary: Up.
Backspace key.
Right.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.Tab
member.summary: Left.
Tab key.
Insert.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.Escape
member.summary: Delete.
Escape key.
Page up.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.Up
member.summary: Page down.
Up arrow key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.Down
member.summary: Down arrow key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.Right
member.summary: Right arrow key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.Left
member.summary: Left arrow key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.Home
member.summary: Home key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.Insert
member.summary: Insert key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.Delete
member.summary: Delete key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.End
member.summary: End key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.PageUp
member.summary: Page up key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.PageDown
member.summary: Page down key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.F1
member.summary: F1 key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.F2
member.summary: F2 key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.F3
member.summary: F3 key.

member.summary: F4 key.

member.summary: F5 key.

member.summary: F6 key.

member.summary: F7 key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.F8
member.summary: F8 key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.F9
member.summary: F9 key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.F10
member.summary: F10 key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.F11
member.summary: F11 key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalKey.F12
member.summary: F12 key.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalModifier
member.summary: UI-agnostic modifier key flags used by and .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalModifier.None
member.summary: No modifier held.
Shift.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalModifier.Shift
member.summary: Alt.
Shift key.
Meta.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalModifier.Alt
member.summary: Alt key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalModifier.Control
member.summary: Control key.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalModifier.Meta
member.summary: Meta / Windows / Command key.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalMouseButton
member.summary: UI-agnostic mouse button identifiers used by .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalMouseButton.None
member.summary: No button.
Left.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalMouseButton.Left
member.summary: Middle.
Left mouse button.
X button1.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalMouseButton.Middle
member.summary: X button2.
Middle mouse button.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalMouseButton.Right
member.summary: Right mouse button.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalMouseButton.XButton1
member.summary: First extended mouse button.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Input.TerminalMouseButton.XButton2
member.summary: Second extended mouse button.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalDecoder
member.summary: A VT/ANSI byte-stream decoder. Feeds raw bytes via ; the decoder maintains terminal state and mutates a screen buffer. Robust decoders never throw on malformed input.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalDecoder.Encoding
member.summary: Gets the encoding used to interpret the byte stream.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalDecoder.Write(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Processes the given data. Implementations must survive invalid/malformed bytes and remain usable after any error (recovery is internal, not via exceptions).

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession
member.summary: Represents a terminal backend session that can provide output via a and accept input as bytes (typically VT/ANSI sequences).

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.BufferUpdated
member.summary: Raised when the terminal buffer content has changed and the UI should re-render.

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.Disconnected
member.summary: Raised when the session becomes disconnected (for example, remote connection loss).

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.InputAvailable
member.summary: Raised when input data is available to be read.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.Buffer
member.summary: Gets the underlying screen buffer used for rendering.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.Decoder
member.summary: Gets the underlaying VT escape sequnces decoder

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.InputEncoding
member.summary: Gets the encoding expected by .

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.OutputEncoding
member.summary: Gets the encoding used by .

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.Title
member.summary: Gets the logical session title (for tabs/windows).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.AvailableDataLength
member.summary: Gets the number of bytes available to be read.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.Resize(System.UInt16,System.UInt16,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resizes the session to the specified terminal dimensions.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.Write(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes input bytes into the session backend.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.Read(System.Span{System.Byte})
member.summary: Reads output bytes from the session.
member.param: Buffer to store the read bytes.
member.returns: The number of bytes actually read (0 if no data available).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interfaces.ITerminalSession.ReadAll
member.summary: Reads all available output bytes from the session.
member.returns: Array containing all available read bytes; empty if no data available.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle
member.summary: The render-relevant attributes of a cell, intentionally excluding the character glyph. The terminal renderer coalesces consecutive cells that share an equal into a single glyph run, so equality and hashing must cover every field.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Foreground
member.summary: Gets the foreground color.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Background
member.summary: Gets the background color.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.UnderlineColor
member.summary: Gets the underline color.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Flags
member.summary: Bitfield of boolean attributes plus default-color sentinels and width flags.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.UnderlineStyle
member.summary: Underline style (single/double/curly/dotted/dashed).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.HyperlinkId
member.summary: Index into the buffer's hyperlink table (0 = none).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.ForegroundIsDefault
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the foreground uses the terminal default color.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.BackgroundIsDefault
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the background uses the terminal default color.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.UnderlineColorIsDefault
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the underline color uses the terminal default color.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Bold
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the text is bold (or intense).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Faint
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the text is faint (dim).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Italic
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the text is italic.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Conceal
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the text is concealed (hidden).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Inverse
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether foreground and background colors are swapped.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Strikethrough
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the text is struck through.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Overline
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the text has an overline.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Fraktur
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the text uses a Fraktur (blackletter) typeface.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Framed
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the cell is framed.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Encircled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the cell is encircled.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.DoublyUnderlined
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the text is doubly underlined.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Wide
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this cell is the first half of a full-width character.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Continuation
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this cell is the second (empty) half of a full-width character.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Blink
member.summary: Gets the blink style (slow, rapid, or none).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle.Default
member.summary: A clean default: default foreground/background, no attributes.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags
member.summary: Boolean cell attributes, default-color sentinels, blink, and width flags.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.None
member.summary: No style flags set.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Bold
member.summary: SGR bold (increased weight / bright color mapping).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Faint
member.summary: SGR faint (decreased intensity).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Italic
member.summary: SGR italic.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Conceal
member.summary: SGR conceal (hidden text).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Inverse
member.summary: SGR inverse video (foreground and background swapped).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Strikethrough
member.summary: SGR strikethrough.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Overline
member.summary: SGR overline.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Fraktur
member.summary: SGR Fraktur (blackletter).

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Framed
member.summary: SGR framed.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Encircled
member.summary: SGR encircled.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.ForegroundIsDefault
member.summary: Foreground uses the terminal default color.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.BackgroundIsDefault
member.summary: Background uses the terminal default color.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.UnderlineColorIsDefault
member.summary: Underline color uses the terminal default color.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Wide
member.summary: Cell is the first half of a full-width character.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.Continuation
member.summary: Cell is the continuation (second half) of a full-width character.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.BlinkSlow
member.summary: SGR slow blink.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.BlinkRapid
member.summary: SGR rapid blink.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.CellStyleFlags.DoublyUnderlined
member.summary: SGR doubly underlined.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo
member.summary: A single screen cell: a Unicode codepoint plus its render style. Mutable so the decoder can write it in place via ref. Equality covers both glyph and style so it can be used both for full-cell comparison and (via ) for glyph-run coalescing.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo.#ctor(System.Text.Rune,VirtualTerminal.Model.CellRenderStyle)
member.summary: A single screen cell: a Unicode codepoint plus its render style. Mutable so the decoder can write it in place via ref. Equality covers both glyph and style so it can be used both for full-cell comparison and (via ) for glyph-run coalescing.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo.Character
member.summary: The codepoint occupying this cell (space when blank).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo.Style
member.summary: Render attributes used for glyph-run coalescing and painting.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo.Blank
member.summary: A blank cell: space glyph with the default style.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo.Clear
member.summary: Resets the cell to a blank space while preserving nothing.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo.Equals(VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo)
member.summary: Indicates whether the current cell is equal to another cell.
member.returns: true if the cells have the same character and style; otherwise false.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo.op_Equality(VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo,VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo)
member.summary: Determines whether two cells are equal.
member.returns: true if the cells are equal; otherwise false.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo.op_Inequality(VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo,VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo)
member.summary: Determines whether two cells are not equal.
member.returns: true if the cells are not equal; otherwise false.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalPalette
member.summary: The 256-entry ANSI color palette (16 system + 216 cube + 24 grayscale). Mutable so OSC 4 / 10 / 11 / 12 can recolor entries at runtime.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalPalette.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the standard xterm 256-color palette.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalPalette.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets or sets the color at the given ANSI index (0–255).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalPalette.AsSpan
member.summary: Returns the underlying palette colors as a span.
member.returns: A span over the 256-entry palette.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalPalette.GetColor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Resolves an ANSI index to its (clamped to 0–255).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalPalette.SetAnsiColor(System.Int32,System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Sets the color at the given ANSI index.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalPalette.LoadXtermDefaults
member.summary: Loads the standard xterm palette: 16 system colors, 6×6×6 cube, 24 grays.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Model.Wcwidth
member.summary: Approximate Unicode character width for terminal grid layout (East Asian Width + emoji). Returns -1 for non-printable control/format codepoints, 0 for zero-width combining marks, 1 for normal, 2 for wide/fullwidth (CJK, fullwidth punctuation, emoji). Tables are derived from the public-domain Markus Kuhn wcwidth data, trimmed to the high-impact ranges.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.Wcwidth.ZeroWidth
member.summary: Zero-width (combining) ranges, inclusive [start, end].

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Model.Wcwidth.Wide
member.summary: Wide / fullwidth ranges, inclusive [start, end].

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Model.Wcwidth.Of(System.Text.Rune)
member.summary: Width of : -1 non-printable, 0 zero-width, 1 normal, 2 wide.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions
member.summary: Customization knobs for a terminal instance: palette, default colors, cursor, scrollback, layout, font fallback, and consent gates for OSC features. Typically bound to a UI control via styled properties and/or set directly on the session's decoder.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.Palette
member.summary: The 256-entry ANSI palette (mutable; OSC 4/10/11/12 recolor entries).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.DefaultForeground
member.summary: Default foreground color used when no SGR foreground is active.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.DefaultBackground
member.summary: Default background color used when no SGR background is active.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.DefaultCursorColor
member.summary: Default cursor color.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.CursorShape
member.summary: Cursor shape (also settable via DECSCUSR).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.CursorBlink
member.summary: Whether the cursor blinks by default.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.CursorBlinkIntervalMs
member.summary: Cursor blink interval in milliseconds.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.ScrollbackMaxLines
member.summary: Maximum scrollback lines retained in the ring buffer.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.LineHeight
member.summary: Line height multiplier (1.0 = default).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.FontFallback
member.summary: Font family names tried when the primary font lacks a glyph (CJK/emoji fallback).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.BoldAsBright
member.summary: SGR bold brightens ANSI 0–7 foreground to 8–15.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.AllowOSCColorQueries
member.summary: Allow OSC 4/10/11/12 color queries to read back current colors.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.AllowClipboard
member.summary: Allow OSC 52 clipboard access.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions.Clone
member.summary: Creates a shallow copy of these options.
member.returns: A new options instance with the same values.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession
member.summary: A canonical, in-memory terminal session with a real line editor: positional cursor editing (left/right/home/end), insert and delete at the cursor, kill shortcuts, and command history (Up/Down). It parses the xterm key sequences the control emits (CSI table, SS3, arrows) rather than treating input as raw characters.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.ShellPrompt
member.summary: Gets or sets the prompt displayed before user input.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.Writer
member.summary: Gets a that feeds output into this session.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.Reader
member.summary: Gets a that reads from this session.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new canonical terminal session with default I/O wrappers and prompt.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.ReadLineAsync
member.summary: Completes when the user submits a line while a caller is awaiting input.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.FeedOutput(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Feeds raw output bytes to the terminal decoder and queues them for .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.FeedOutput(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes and feeds the resulting bytes to .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.Write(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Processes input bytes as xterm key sequences or raw characters.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.RedrawLine
member.summary: Reprints the active prompt + current input, clears the trailing tail, and positions the caret.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.PrintPrompt
member.summary: Resets the input line and prints a fresh prompt.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.ExecuteCommandAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Called when the user submits a line and no is pending. Override this in derived classes to implement built-in commands; the base implementation simply prints a fresh prompt.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.Read(System.Span{System.Byte})
member.summary: Copies up to .Length bytes from the output queue into .
member.returns: The number of bytes read.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.ReadAll
member.summary: Reads all queued output bytes into a newly allocated array.
member.returns: A byte array containing all queued output, or an empty array if none is available.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.CanonicalTerminalSession.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases resources held by this session.
member.param: true when called from ; otherwise false.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Session.DummyTerminalSession
member.summary: Minimal implementation useful for testing UI and rendering without an external backend (process/SSH/etc.).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Session.DummyTerminalSession.Title
member.summary: Gets the session title.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalSession
member.summary: Base implementation of that owns a and exposes helper notifications for UI updates and disconnect events.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalSession.Buffer
member.summary: Gets the underlying for derived sessions that need to apply local-only VT sequences (e.g. clearing the screen during ConPTY resize).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalSession.InternalDecoder
member.summary: Gets the underlying used to parse VT input for this session.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalSession.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new session with a fresh and default input encoding.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalSession.AddToInputQueue(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Adds data to the input queue to be read by consumers.
member.param: Data to add to the input queue.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalSession.NotifyBufferUpdated
member.summary: Raises to notify the UI that the buffer has changed.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalSession.NotifyInputAvailable
member.summary: Raises to notify that input data is available for reading.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalSession.NotifyDisconnected
member.summary: Raises to notify listeners that the session was disconnected.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalSession.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases resources held by a derived session implementation.
member.param: true when called from ; otherwise false.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalSession.ThrowIfDisposed
member.summary: Throws if the session has already been disposed.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalSession.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the session and its underlying .

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession
member.summary: Base class for hosting a TUI application directly inside an . The application renders using VT/ANSI escape sequences (alternate screen buffer, colors, box-drawing characters) and receives keyboard input through .

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.Width
member.summary: Current terminal width in columns.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.Height
member.summary: Current terminal height in rows.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.FeedOutput(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Feeds raw output bytes into the terminal decoder and notifies the UI.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.FeedOutput(System.String)
member.summary: Feeds a text string into the terminal decoder and notifies the UI.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.Run
member.summary: Enters the alternate screen buffer and triggers the first render.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.Render
member.summary: Called to redraw the whole TUI surface.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.OnKey(System.ConsoleKey)
member.summary: Called when a TUI key is pressed.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.ClearScreen
member.summary: Clears the screen and moves the cursor to the top-left corner.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.SetCursor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Moves the cursor to the specified cell.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.DrawText(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Draws text at the specified cell, clamped to the visible area.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.SetColor(System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Sets foreground and background colors using the 256-color palette.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.ResetColor
member.summary: Resets all attributes to defaults.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.DrawBox(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Draws a box using box-drawing characters. The border is drawn inside the given rectangle.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Session.TerminalUserInterfaceSession.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Leaves the alternate screen buffer and shows the cursor again.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder
member.summary: The terminal state machine's handler: receives parsed VT/ANSI events from and applies them to the and . Implements for the session layer and keeps the historical class name so existing casts (is TerminalDecoder) keep working.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.Buffer
member.summary: Gets the terminal screen buffer being modified by this decoder.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.State
member.summary: Gets the current terminal state (cursor, attributes, modes).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.Options
member.summary: Gets or sets options that control rendering and behavior.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.Title
member.summary: Current window title (OSC 0/1/2).

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.TitleChanged
member.summary: Raised when the title changes.

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.Bell
member.summary: Raised on BEL.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.SendOutput
member.summary: Wire to the session output queue so reports (DSR/DA/…) reach the client.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.CursorPosition
member.summary: Gets the current cursor position as a point.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.Encoding
member.summary: Gets the encoding used by the underlying VT parser.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.#ctor(VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer,VirtualTerminal.Options.TerminalOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new with an optional buffer and options.
member.param: Screen buffer to use, or null to create a default buffer.
Options to use, or null to use default options.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.Write(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes a span of raw VT/ANSI bytes to the decoder.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.Resize(System.UInt16,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Resizes the underlying screen buffer and clamps the cursor into the new bounds.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.Resize(System.UInt16,System.UInt16,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resizes the underlying screen buffer and clamps the cursor into the new bounds.
member.param: true to push removed rows into scrollback.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalDecoder.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the underlying VT parser resources.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams
member.summary: A sub-parameter-aware view over the parameters of a CSI/DCS sequence. Values are stored flat; reports whether the value at an index was introduced by a ':' separator (a sub-parameter of the preceding ';'-group) rather than by ';'. This is what distinguishes e.g. 4:3 (curly underline) from 4;3 (single underline + italic), and 38:2:... from 38;2;....

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams.Length
member.summary: Number of stored values (top-level + sub).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Raw value at (no bounds check beyond count).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams.At(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Value at , or when absent.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams.IsSubParam(System.Int32)
member.summary: Whether the value at is a ':' sub-parameter.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams.IsEmpty
member.summary: True when no parameters were supplied (e.g. bare CSI m).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Enumerates (index, value, isSubParam).

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams.Enumerator
member.summary: Supports iterating over the parameters of a value.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams.Enumerator.MoveNext
member.summary: Advances the enumerator to the next parameter.
member.returns: true if another parameter is available; otherwise false.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams.Enumerator.Current
member.summary: Gets the current parameter index, value, and sub-parameter flag.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Vt.IVtHandler
member.summary: Sink for parsed VT/ANSI events. Implementations own the terminal state (cursor, modes, attributes) and mutate the screen buffer. The decoder calls these synchronously during , so parameters are only valid for the duration of the call. Reference: Paul Williams' VT500 state machine (vt100.net), xterm ctlseqs, ECMA-48.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.IVtHandler.Print(System.Text.Rune)
member.summary: A printable codepoint was received.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.IVtHandler.Execute(System.Byte)
member.summary: A C0 control character (0x00–0x1F) was received in an executable context.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.IVtHandler.EscDispatch(System.Byte,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: An ESC sequence completed (e.g. ESC 7, ESC D, ESC ( B).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.IVtHandler.CsiDispatch(System.Byte,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams@,System.Char)
member.summary: A CSI sequence completed.
member.param: The DEC private marker ('?', '>', '=', '<', '!') if present, else '\0'.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.IVtHandler.OscDispatch(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: An OSC string completed (BEL or ST terminated). Body is the raw bytes after the OSC introducer.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.IVtHandler.DcsHook(System.Byte,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},VirtualTerminal.Vt.CsiParams@,System.Char)
member.summary: A DCS sequence began. Phase 1 collects the payload; streaming is a Phase 3 concern.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.IVtHandler.DcsPut(System.Byte)
member.summary: A payload byte for the current DCS sequence.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.IVtHandler.DcsUnhook
member.summary: The current DCS sequence ended (ST).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.IVtHandler.SosPmApcDispatch(System.Byte,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: An SOS/PM/APC string completed. is the introducer byte ('X','^','_').

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Vt.OscDispatcher
member.summary: Processes OSC (Operating System Command) payloads: window title (0/1/2), palette recolor (4), default colors (10/11/12), and hyperlinks (8). Queries (4?/10?/…) and clipboard (52) are gated for Phase 2.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.OscDispatcher.ParseColorSpec(System.String)
member.summary: Parses an XParseColor-style spec: #RRGGBB, #RGB, or rgb:RR/GG/BB.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Vt.VtDecoder
member.summary:
A table-driven VT500-family state machine that parses a raw byte stream into structured events delivered to an . Reference: Paul Williams' VT500 state machine (https://vt100.net/emu/dec_ansi_parser), xterm ctlseqs, ECMA-48.
Robustness contract: it never throws on malformed/unknown input — unknown sequences are consumed and the machine returns to . This is the opposite of the legacy parser, which threw InvalidByteException.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.VtDecoder.#ctor(VirtualTerminal.Vt.IVtHandler)
member.summary:
A table-driven VT500-family state machine that parses a raw byte stream into structured events delivered to an . Reference: Paul Williams' VT500 state machine (https://vt100.net/emu/dec_ansi_parser), xterm ctlseqs, ECMA-48.
Robustness contract: it never throws on malformed/unknown input — unknown sequences are consumed and the machine returns to . This is the opposite of the legacy parser, which threw InvalidByteException.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Vt.VtDecoder.Encoding
member.summary: Gets the encoding used by this decoder (always UTF-8).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.VtDecoder.Write(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Feeds a raw byte stream through the state machine.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.VtDecoder.Reset
member.summary: Resets the parser to and discards any in-flight sequence.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Vt.VtDecoder.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the current object.
Releases resources used by the decoder and resets the parser state.

member.name: T:Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.EmbeddedAttribute
member.summary: A special attribute recognized by Roslyn, that marks a type as "embedded", meaning it won't ever be visible from other assemblies.
